title: 10 Days in Japan — Snow Festivals, Early Sakura & Mount Fuji
excerpt: Sapporo → Asahikawa → Otaru → Odawara → Izu → Tokyo. Snow festivals and penguin parades in Hokkaido, then early-blooming sakura and coastal drives through the Izu Peninsula.

title: 13 Days Across Italy — A Winter Family Trip
excerpt: Milan → Florence → Pisa → Rome → Venice. Christmas in Milan, NYE at the Colosseum, a gondola through Venice — a comfortable family winter trip with full cost breakdown.

title: 5 Days in Seoul — Palaces, Street Food & Cafe Culture
excerpt: Gyeongbokgung → Bukchon → Nami Island → DMZ → Hongdae. Hanbok-clad palace walks, BBQ feasts, extraordinary cafe culture, and a sobering trip to the DMZ.
